findings.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
findings.description: The function accepts user-controlled URL input and makes server-side HTTP requests without validation, allowing attackers to access internal services or perform SSRF attacks
findings.fix: Implement URL validation with an allowlist of permitted domains/protocols, validate URLs against a safe pattern, and restrict access to internal network ranges
